titleStmt.title: SII 37.411: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 411. (A.R. No. B 58 of 1941-42.) Māṭumaḍugu, Venkatagiri Taluk, Nellore District.

summary.p: Slab set up near ruined temple.
This is dated Śaka 1465, Śōbhakṛit (expired) Āsvajuja, śu. 12, corresponding to 1542 A.D., September 20.

It registers the grant of the village Māmiḍimadugu surnamed as Śrīnivāsapuram in the Veluṁpāṭi-sīma made by the king, as ekabhōga, to Tirumala Tātāchārya of the Śaṭhamarshaṇagōtra. The gift was made on the banks of the river Tungabhadra in the presence of the god Viṭhalēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1465 Agunēṭi śōbhakṛt saṁvatsara
Āśvīja śu 12 lu . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra sadāśivadēvamahā
rāyalu śaṭhama¨rṣaṇa gōtra Āpastaṁbha sūtra ya
juśśākhādhyāyulaina tirupati ga
ḍaṁ tirumala tātācāryulaṁgāriki tuṁ
gabhadrātīramaṁdu śrīviṭhalēśvaruni sannatini
sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvakamugānu velu
ṁpāṭi śīmalōni māmiḍimaḍugu grāmaṁ śrīnivā
sapuramani pratināmadhēyaṁśēśi Ācaṁdrā¨rkka
sthāyigānu yēkabhōgaṁgānu yiccenu . yi
di vāru saṁtāna paraṁparagānu
Anubhaviṁcēdi
Digital edition of SII 37.411 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
